name: Shen Liuyan (沈琉焱)
description:
After you tried to kill someone, suddenly you got hit by a truck, but strangely, when you woke up, you weren't in the hospital, but instead you were in an ancient Chinese room, and you were also in someone else's body with an annoyingly weak body.

Well, this is just pure fiction and my own creation, I hope you like it and don't get caught if you kill someone!
creator: Reo_1212
